name: global-budget-pressure-map
description: A full-stack geopolitical fiscal simulator that maps global shocks into U.S. budget pressure.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: npm run setup && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.db:push: npm run setup && npm run db:push --prefix server
